title: JSON Feed discoverability repair (Content-Type + sitemap)

repairs.fix: Set response header in blog_controller.rb#feed_json to application/feed+json; charset=utf-8

repairs.issue: JSON Feed URL not in sitemap.xml — invisible to search crawlers
repairs.fix: Added blog/feed.json with changefreq=daily to sitemap.xml via pages_controller.rb#blog_public_urls

prior_turn_context: Previous turn built JSON Feed endpoint at /blog/feed.json (controller, route, view, llms.txt entry, auto-discovery link)
Route fix applied: format constraints instead of path suffix to handle Rails .json extension routing
Auto-discovery href fix applied: explicit https://ralphworkflow.com/blog/feed.json URL
Production deploy verified: HTTP 200, JSON Feed v1.1, 36 items, valid structure
commits: ed571ec — fix: JSON Feed Content-Type + sitemap.xml discovery

execution_board_context.why_not_measurement_hold: Rules prohibit logging another idle measurement hold when a concrete distribution_architecture_repair is possible. Content-Type + sitemap were genuine discoverability gaps in the JSON Feed surface built by the prior turn.
